name: fp346001x159
drl:
rule R0 salience -2 when $p : T1(f2 == false) then drools.setFocus("g"); modify($p) { setF2(true) } end
rule R1 salience 2 when $p : T1($x : f0) then drools.setFocus("g"); end
rule R2 agenda-group "g" when $p : T1(f0 == "x") then end
rule R3 when $p : T1(f0 contains "zz", $b : f2) then drools.setFocus("g"); end
